---
title: "The Pleasure of Finding Things Out"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: 
    categories:
      - Python
      - R
      - Machine Learning
      - Statistical Modeling
      - Linux
  
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
